evals.name: successful-clean-launch
evals.prompt: The tower defense game code is ready. Run /launch to validate everything works end-to-end before we test it manually.
evals.expected_output: Full test-launch cycle completes with final status ✓ READY TO PLAY. All 5 phases pass without requiring fixes.

evals.name: launch-with-auto-fix
evals.prompt: I just made changes to the tower defense game. Can you run /launch to make sure everything still works? Fix any issues you find automatically if possible.
evals.expected_output: Test-launch cycle runs, Phase 3 fails initially, Phase 4 auto-fixes the issue, final status shows ✓ READY TO PLAY with fixes_applied list populated.

evals.name: launch-catch-syntax-error
evals.prompt: I'm about to submit the tower defense game. Run /launch to catch any issues before I push.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 syntax check detects Python syntax error, stops gracefully, and reports exact file and line number. Final status is ✗ NEEDS ATTENTION with clear guidance on the syntax error.
